summary.verdict: MIXED: warmup-only KD retains a positive but sub-threshold effect. C4 top1 delta vs scratch=+0.139 pp with 95% CI [+0.118, +0.157].

full_kd_sanity_check.narrative: full_kd is consistent with the g167 reference band: observed C4 top1 delta=+1.014 pp with 95% CI [+0.988, +1.036] vs g167 +1.014 pp [+0.988, +1.036].

mechanism_test.narrative: Warmup-only KD retains a positive but non-canonical effect: C4 top1 delta vs scratch is +0.139 pp with 95% CI [+0.118, +0.157]. The result clears zero but misses the +0.30 pp init-signal bar.
mechanism_test.timing_narrative: Full-duration KD materially beats late-only KD on C4 top1: +0.313 pp with 95% CI [+0.272, +0.339].
mechanism_test.late_vs_warmup_narrative: Late-only KD beats warmup-only KD on C4 top1 by +0.561 pp with 95% CI [+0.516, +0.646], which leans toward a continuous-constraint interpretation.

active_ingredient_analysis.full_kd_sanity: full_kd is consistent with the g167 reference band: observed C4 top1 delta=+1.014 pp with 95% CI [+0.988, +1.036] vs g167 +1.014 pp [+0.988, +1.036].
active_ingredient_analysis.timing_narrative: Full-duration KD materially beats late-only KD on C4 top1: +0.313 pp with 95% CI [+0.272, +0.339].
active_ingredient_analysis.late_vs_warmup_narrative: Late-only KD beats warmup-only KD on C4 top1 by +0.561 pp with 95% CI [+0.516, +0.646], which leans toward a continuous-constraint interpretation.

verdict: MIXED: warmup-only KD retains a positive but sub-threshold effect. C4 top1 delta vs scratch=+0.139 pp with 95% CI [+0.118, +0.157].
